data.body: Sprint execution mode: HYBRID. Stories 93e3-89d9, 4be7-16e0, 0096-eb93, ac74-2505, b7e3-1280, 5c41-c296 will close on observable external evidence (the work product lives in navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template, not in this repo). Story 6bf8-858d (real-URL e2e validation) will go through proper TDD — it produces an in-repo test script. User authorized navapbc org write access in this session.
